patches.summary: Added an official-CLI-style dynamic run surface with schema help, project aliases, prompt shorthand, typed key-value inputs, pricing, waits, and downloads.
patches.reason: WaveSpeed model IDs are slash-delimited dynamic paths with per-model schemas, so a generated static endpoint wrapper cannot provide the official model-run ergonomics by itself.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./...; dry-run run and price smokes; live price-only smoke for google/nano-banana/Seedance-family model inputs

patches.summary: Added media upload/download helpers and media input shorthands for image and video generation workflows.
patches.reason: Nano Banana edit, Seedance, Kling, and Veo workflows commonly require local reference images or videos to be uploaded and passed as model input URLs.
patches.validated_outcome: Dry-run Seedance image-to-video upload coercion and Kling element_list JSON file parsing passed.

patches.summary: Added model search/filter ergonomics and official-style aliases for common account/history commands.
patches.reason: WaveSpeed users need to discover fast-changing model families and recognize official CLI command names while keeping the generated endpoint commands available.
patches.validated_outcome: models z-image --json returned filtered live catalog results; publish verify passed.

patches.summary: Hardened custom run input aliases and raw media transfer paths after public-library review.
patches.reason: The hand-authored run surface needed separate --set backing storage and custom upload/download requests needed to honor configured client rate limiting, timeout, and credential-validation policy.
patches.validated_outcome: go test ./... passed after the publish-review fixes, including mixed --set/--input-kv and echoed-input URL filtering.
